root.not_found_desc: Head back to your portfolio to continue.
root.site_description: Invest, track your performance, measure your impact. A clear, responsible experience.

landing.meta_title: Seedow — The ESG audit of your savings
landing.meta_desc: Enter your portfolio, get a transparent ESG audit: weighted score, coverage rate, honest blind spots. No investment pitch.
landing.og_desc: Transparent ESG audit. Enter your portfolio, see what it really funds.
landing.subtitle: The ESG audit of your savings.
landing.manifesto_text: Your savings tell a story. We read it out loud.
landing.demo_desc: Type a ticker, see what your portfolio would say. A taste of the full audit.
landing.demo_data_note: {{name}} · demo data, full audit on your real portfolio.
landing.demo_unknown: Unknown ticker in demo. Try AAPL, TSLA, TTE, MC or NESN.

pillars.1_body: Weighted ESG score on your real portfolio. No simulation, no marketing ranking.
pillars.2_body: Every figure shows its source and date. The methodology is public and reproducible.
pillars.3_body: Uncovered holdings stay visible. An honest audit beats a misleading average.

landing.method_desc: Sector exclusions, weighted ESG scores, explicit coverage rate, time-stamped sources. Every figure can be traced back to its public source.

faqs.a1: Seedow audits your existing portfolio through an ESG lens. You enter your holdings (ISIN or ticker, amount or %), we compute a weighted average score, a data coverage rate and surface the blind spots. No investment pitch — just reading.
faqs.q2: Where do the ESG scores come from?
faqs.a2: Data comes from public providers (Yahoo Finance ESG, MSCI ESG when available). Every score shows its source and date. Uncovered holdings are flagged as ‘unauditable’ — not hidden.
faqs.a3: The audit is free. Later, Seedow will offer a paid realignment service (actionable recommendations, monitoring). The audit itself will stay open.
faqs.a4: No bank data is stored. You enter your holdings manually. You can export or delete your account at any time.

landing.final_title_a: Your savings deserve to be read.
landing.footer_copy: © 2026 Seedow — Editorial reading of your savings.

auth.desc_signup: Test phase — no real transactions. Demo mode only.
auth.desc_beta_full: All 300 beta seats are taken. Leave your email for the next wave.
auth.desc_waitlisted: You're #{{position}} on the list. We'll let you know as soon as a seat opens.

waitlist.meta_desc: The Seedow beta is full. Join the waitlist to be notified when a seat opens.
waitlist.title: All 300 seats are taken.
waitlist.desc: Leave your email — we'll let you know as soon as a seat opens or we release the next wave of testers.

beta.banner_detail: · virtual capital · real prices · no money invested
beta.feedback_thanks_desc: Every message is read personally during the beta.
beta.feedback_desc: 3 questions max. Anonymous to the team unless you want us to reach back.
beta.feedback_nps_label: Would you recommend Seedow? (0 = no, 10 = yes)
